title: descurainia irio
intro: Descurainia irio, also known as tansy mustard or western tansy mustard, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, typically found in the western regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Descurainia irio include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Descurainia irio can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to treat skin issues or taken internally to support overall health.
